description: Add persistent read-state notification center with filtering and clear actions.

userStories.title: Persist notification read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want notification read state saved so that read or unread status persists across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification storage includes read-state field per notification
Existing notifications default to unread where read state is absent
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add backend notification read-state actions
userStories.description: As a user, I want to mark notifications read or unread so that I can manage what still needs attention.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend action marks a notification as read
Backend action marks a notification as unread
Read-state updates persist and return updated state
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add notification center list surface
userStories.description: As a user, I want to open a notification list so that I can review individual notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification center surface opens from app navigation
List renders notifications with current read-state indicators
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Show unread badge count
userStories.description: As a user, I want an unread badge so that I can quickly see when new notifications need review.
acceptanceCriteria: Header or nav shows unread count badge when unread notifications exist
Unread badge count updates after marking notifications read or unread
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filter notifications by read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state so that I can focus on unread or reviewed items.
acceptanceCriteria: Filter controls include All, Unread, and Read
Selecting a filter updates list contents to matching notifications
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Clear all read notifications
userStories.description: As a user, I want to clear all read notifications so that old reviewed items do not clutter my notification list.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification center provides clear-all-read action
Action removes all read notifications and keeps unread notifications
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
